description: Import characters and lorebooks from JanitorAI (public + closed/hidden), with optional trigger-key translation.
author: you
author_notes: Uses the LLM endpoint already configured inside SillyTavern (same key & model you roleplay with). Needs an active JanitorAI session in the same Chrome profile — open janitorai.com in any tab and log in once. A throwaway JanitorAI account is recommended.
